title: Bee Removal White Plains NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in White Plains, NY starting at $350. Safe, humane bee extraction for homes & businesses. Licensed experts serving Westchester. Call today!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout White Plains and Westchester County, with pricing ranging from $350 to $550 depending on the complexity of the hive location and size. Our licensed technicians safely remove bees from residential and commercial properties while prioritizing the preservation of these essential pollinators. We serve all White Plains neighborhoods from downtown to the residential areas near Battle Hill and beyond.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Westchester County, Best Pest Control NYC combines rapid response times with humane bee removal techniques that protect both your property and local bee populations. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and trained in the latest safe extraction methods, ensuring complete removal without harmful chemicals.
localContext: White Plains properties, from historic homes near Court Street to modern condos downtown and single-family residences near Rochambeau Park, commonly experience bee activity during warmer months. The city's mix of urban development and green spaces like Tibbets Brook Park creates ideal conditions for bee colonies to establish themselves in attics, wall voids, and outdoor structures.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in White Plains typically range from $350 to $550, depending on factors such as hive location, size of the colony, accessibility, and whether structural repairs are needed after extraction. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my White Plains property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most White Plains bee removal requests. Our team understands the urgency of bee infestations, especially when they pose risks to family members or customers, and we prioritize rapid response throughout Westchester County.

faqs.question: Do you kill the bees or relocate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we use humane removal methods to relocate bee colonies rather than exterminating them. Bees are vital pollinators, and we work with local beekeepers to rehome colonies safely. In cases where relocation isn't feasible due to safety concerns, we use targeted treatments as a last resort.

faqs.question: What types of bees do you remove in White Plains?
faqs.answer: We remove all common bee species found in Westchester County, including honeybees, carpenter bees, bumblebees, and yellow jackets (wasps often mistaken for bees). Our technicians identify the species and use appropriate removal techniques for each type, ensuring complete elimination and prevention of future infestations.
